series_metadata.series_description: Statements disclosing financial information for employees serving in designated positions. (The forms are filed with the Ohio Ethics Commission, By policy, the Ohio Facilities Construction Commission maintains a copy of the front page -- information sheet.)

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until converted to machine readable, are superseded, or until the employee separates from the designated position. ; Electronic: Retain until superseded or until the employee separates from the designated position., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
